'''rorakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waferish|waferish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waferish|waferish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rorakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rorakithi|rorakithi]] || [[word:rorakiji|rorakiji]] || [[word:rorakishi|rorakishi]] || [[word:rorakiki|rorakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rorakuthuthu|rorakuthuthu]] || [[word:rorakujuju|rorakujuju]] || [[word:rorakushushu|rorakushushu]] || [[word:rorakukuku|rorakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rorakuthu|rorakuthu]] || [[word:rorakuju|rorakuju]] || [[word:rorakushu|rorakushu]] || [[word:rorakuku|rorakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rorakufthuf|rorakufthuf]] || [[word:rorakufjuf|rorakufjuf]] || [[word:rorakufshuf|rorakufshuf]] || [[word:rorakufkuf|rorakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rorakethe|rorakethe]] || [[word:rorakeje|rorakeje]] || [[word:rorakeshe|rorakeshe]] || [[word:rorakeke|rorakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rorakothotho|rorakothotho]] || [[word:rorakojojo|rorakojojo]] || [[word:rorakoshosho|rorakoshosho]] || [[word:rorakokoko|rorakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rorakotho|rorakotho]] || [[word:rorakojo|rorakojo]] || [[word:rorakosho|rorakosho]] || [[word:rorakoko|rorakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rorakofthof|rorakofthof]] || [[word:rorakofjof|rorakofjof]] || [[word:rorakofshof|rorakofshof]] || [[word:rorakofkof|rorakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfthÃŸf|rorakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfjÃŸf|rorakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfshÃŸf|rorakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfkÃŸf|rorakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rorakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rorakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rorakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rorakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfthÃŸf|rorakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfjÃŸf|rorakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfshÃŸf|rorakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfkÃŸf|rorakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfthÃŸf|rorakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfjÃŸf|rorakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfshÃŸf|rorakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rorakÃŸfkÃŸf|rorakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rorakÃḊthÃḊ|rorakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rorakÃḊjÃḊ|rorakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rorakÃḊshÃḊ|rorakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rorakÃḊkÃḊ|rorakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rorakathatha|rorakathatha]] || [[word:rorakajaja|rorakajaja]] || [[word:rorakashasha|rorakashasha]] || [[word:rorakakaka|rorakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rorakatha|rorakatha]] || [[word:rorakaja|rorakaja]] || [[word:rorakasha|rorakasha]] || [[word:rorakaka|rorakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rorakafthaf|rorakafthaf]] || [[word:rorakafjaf|rorakafjaf]] || [[word:rorakafshaf|rorakafshaf]] || [[word:rorakafkaf|rorakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rorakasha|rorakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rorakshÃḋsha|rorakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rorakrosha|rorakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rorakmusha|rorakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rorakyasha|rorakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororaknkshÃḋsha|gororaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororaknkrosha|gororaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororaknkmusha|gororaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororaknkyasha|gororaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rorarakasha|rorarakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rorarakshÃḋsha|rorarakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rorarakrosha|rorarakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rorarakmusha|rorarakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rorarakyasha|rorarakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororaraknkshÃḋsha|gororaraknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororaraknkrosha|gororaraknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororaraknkmusha|gororaraknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororaraknkyasha|gororaraknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rerÃḊkasha|rerÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rerÃḊkshÃḋsha|rerÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rerÃḊkrosha|rerÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rerÃḊkmusha|rerÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rerÃḊkyasha|rerÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorerÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gorerÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorerÃḊknkrosha|gorerÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorerÃḊknkmusha|gorerÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorerÃḊknkyasha|gorerÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rorfakasha|rorfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rorfakshÃḋsha|rorfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rorfakrosha|rorfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rorfakmusha|rorfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rorfakyasha|rorfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororfaknkshÃḋsha|gororfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororfaknkrosha|gororfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororfaknkmusha|gororfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororfaknkyasha|gororfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
